title: acosta boissieri subsp. mariolensis
intro: Acosta boissieri subsp. mariolensis, also known as Mariola's acosta, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to offer several health benefits, including reducing fever, soothing digestive issues, and alleviating respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of Acosta boissieri subsp. mariolensis, such as infusions and decoctions, have been used in traditional medicine to support overall well-being and combat various ailments.
